credentialRequirements.name: LLM_API_KEY
credentialRequirements.description: LLM provider API key (e.g. OpenAI, Anthropic, Cohere)

credentialRequirements.name: LLM_MODEL
credentialRequirements.description: Target LLM model identifier (e.g. gpt-4o, claude-3-5-sonnet)

credentialRequirements.name: AGENT_RUNTIME_DEPLOY_TOKEN
credentialRequirements.obtainedFrom: Agent runtime platform (e.g. LangSmith, Fixie, Modal)

credentialRequirements.name: VECTOR_STORE_TOKEN
credentialRequirements.description: Vector store API key for embeddings persistence

approvalGate.blockedReason: Agent runtime deployment requires LLM_API_KEY, LLM_MODEL, and AGENT_RUNTIME_DEPLOY_TOKEN. LLM provider credentials require account-level access and model access policy approvals. No credentials supplied in proof pass.
requiredUserActions: Confirm LLM model access policy allows intended model
Review agent governance policy before deployment

providerAdapters.commandTemplate: modal deploy agent.py (or platform-equivalent deploy command)

secretPolicyChecks.description: No .env files with real credential values committed to source
secretPolicyChecks.detail: No committed .env files with real credential values detected for ai_agent

secretPolicyChecks.description: Environment variable manifest (.env.example or app.config.json) is present
All required credentials declare mustNotBeCommitted=true for secrets
secretPolicyChecks.detail: mustNotBeCommitted=true is declared for all secret-class credentials in the credential manifest.

secretPolicyChecks.description: No hardcoded secret patterns (API keys, JWT tokens, AWS keys) found in source files
secretPolicyChecks.detail: No hardcoded secret patterns detected in ai_agent source files

caveat: This manifest declares credential requirements for approved credentialed deployment. No credentials are stored, validated, or used in this proof pass. Live deployment is blocked by default and requires explicit user approval and user-supplied credentials.
